title: Implement fizzbuzz(n) in fizzbuzz.mjs
prompt: Implement the `fizzbuzz(n)` function in fizzbuzz.mjs. It must return an array of n entries for the integers 1..n: the number itself, except multiples of 3 become "Fizz", multiples of 5 become "Buzz", and multiples of both become "FizzBuzz". Numbers stay numbers (not strings). For n <= 0 return an empty array.
